title: rupicapnos numidica
intro: Rupicapnos numidica, also known as the hornpoppy or numidian hornpoppy, is a flowering plant species in the poppy family (Papaveraceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to stimulate the nervous system and treat conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues. The plant's health benefits include its anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic properties, which can help to reduce pain and alleviate symptoms of conditions such as bronchitis and asthma. Rupicapnos numidica can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal and therapeutic properties.
